# ucode Documentation Index
# Source: https://github.com/jow-/ucode (commit: e87be9d)
# Live docs: https://ucode.mein.io/
# Generated: 2026-03-05 18:43 UTC
#
# ucode is a tiny ECMAScript-like scripting language for OpenWrt.
# Provides bindings for ubus, uci, uloop, netlink, and other OpenWrt APIs.
# Syntax closely resembles ECMAScript; synchronous; no OOP standard library.
#
# Standalone use: each .md file in this folder is self-contained with full
# metadata headers. This llms.txt provides the navigational index.
#
## Files in this directory

- [ucode-module-debug.md](/ucode-docs/ucode-module-debug.md): ucode `debug` module — 1 documented member
- [ucode-module-digest.md](/ucode-docs/ucode-module-digest.md): ucode `digest` module — 1 documented member
- [ucode-module-fs.md](/ucode-docs/ucode-module-fs.md): ucode `fs` module — 1 documented member
- [ucode-module-io.md](/ucode-docs/ucode-module-io.md): ucode `io` module — 1 documented member
- [ucode-module-log.md](/ucode-docs/ucode-module-log.md): ucode `log` module — 1 documented member
- [ucode-module-math.md](/ucode-docs/ucode-module-math.md): ucode `math` module — 1 documented member
- [ucode-module-nl80211.md](/ucode-docs/ucode-module-nl80211.md): ucode `nl80211` module — 1 documented member
- [ucode-module-resolv.md](/ucode-docs/ucode-module-resolv.md): ucode `resolv` module — 1 documented member
